Learn how to use the right Power Apps variable when, with this fun video.

videos.title: The Most Important AI News from Google I/O
videos.description:
Google I/O unveiled Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Antigravity 2.0, and Gemini Spark, framing a push toward multimodal generation and agentic tools. Omni showcased powerful video-to-video editing and fine-grained steerability. Gemini 3.5 Flash emphasized speed at the expense of token efficiency and cost, while Antigravity 2.0 and Spark targeted coding agents and personal assistants amid product sprawl and enterprise token-cost pressure.

The AI Daily Brief helps you understand the most important news a

videos.title: 9 Codex Tips from the Codex Team
videos.description: Composer 2.5 narrows the gap with frontier coding models on key benchmarks while Cursor touts dramatic token‑efficiency at a fraction of the cost. Enterprise strategy is shifting toward harness‑first platforms and agent orchestration, capturing long‑running context, persistent memories, and post‑training improvements to rival model labs. Security research around Mythos Preview shows models synthesizing and refining exploit chains into functional proofs, prompting Cloudflare warnings about a nove

videos.title: The Gemini Redesign Is Here: It’s Gorgeous (New Ui, Live, and Visuals)
videos.description:
Google just gave Gemini a complete redesign with a new UI, an upgraded Gemini Live, and rich visual responses that make the app feel brand new.

More details on availability coming soon. This update won't be available to everyone yet. 

Thank you Google for inviting me to IO. #Geminiearlyaccess

This video is not sponsored.

videos.title: Gemini Omni is Totally Wild (Google’s New Video Model)
videos.description:
Google just dropped a wild new AI video model that lets you insert yourself into any scene you can imagine. And it's available right inside Gemini.

Rolling out today for Pro and Ultra users globally in the Gemini app and in Flow. 

Thank you Google for inviting me to IO. #Geminiearlyaccess

This video is not sponsored.
